texto: Deeply rooted in the universalist Western tradition of the Stoics and the the early medieval Christians, Tolkien created a myth to explore the nature of the human person against the avaricious dreams of the capitalists and the diabolical schemes of the national and international socialists, all of whom would replace God with man.
explicacao: Citação de Bradley J. Birzer sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Deeply rooted in the universalist Western tradition of the Stoics and the the early medieval Chri…” articula motivacao, capitalism, myth em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como myth e socialism.
